practicals.title: Practical 1: Linear and Binary Search
practicals.desc: Write a menu based program to store roll numbers of students who attended a training program. Implement Linear Search for unsorted data and Binary Search for sorted data to check whether a particular student attended the training program.

practicals.title: Practical 2: Sorting Techniques
practicals.desc: Write a program to store first year percentages of students and sort them using Selection Sort and Bubble Sort. Display the top five scores.

practicals.title: Practical 3: Hash Table Implementation
practicals.desc: Implement a telephone book database using hash table. Use collision handling techniques such as linear probing, quadratic probing, and double hashing.

practicals.title: Practical 4: Linked List Applications
practicals.desc: Implement singly linked list to manage club member information or perform set operations like union, intersection, and difference using linked lists.

practicals.title: Practical 5: Doubly Linked List
practicals.desc: Implement a doubly linked list for applications such as seat booking system or appointment scheduling with operations like insert, delete, display, and sorting.

practicals.title: Practical 6: Stack Applications
practicals.desc: Write a program using stack to check balanced parentheses or perform infix to postfix conversion and its evaluation.

practicals.title: Practical 7: Queue Applications
practicals.desc: Implement a queue to simulate job scheduling or order processing using enqueue and dequeue operations.

practicals.title: Practical 8: Binary Search Tree
practicals.desc: Construct a Binary Search Tree and perform operations like insertion, searching, finding minimum value, longest path, and mirror transformation.

practicals.title: Practical 9: Graph Representation
practicals.desc: Represent graph using adjacency list or adjacency matrix and check whether the graph is connected.

practicals.title: Practical 10: Minimum Cost Graph Problem
practicals.desc: Solve a real-world problem such as connecting offices with minimum cost using appropriate data structures and graph algorithms.

practicals.title: Practical 11: Mini Project
practicals.desc: Design a mini project demonstrating the use of different data structures and analyzing performance and efficiency.
